text:
is a music video of the song of same name by Hikaru Utada. It was directed by Kazuya Tsurumaki and released on the official Evangelion Website on 02 December 2014. The song was used as the main theme of the film Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone.

Staff

Director: Kazuya Tsurumaki
3DCGI: Takeshi Myagi
Art: Hiroshi Kato (Totonyan)
Photography: Nanae Hirabayashi, Junpei Takatsu
Editor: Yeong-mi Lee
Production: Tomoyuki Ogata, Takatoshi Okajima
Animation Production: studio khara
